content: نَتائِجُ الاِنتِخاباتِ تُذاعُ على الْهَواءِ مُباشَرَةً
translations: eng:the election results were announced on air live [immediately]

transcriptions.arabizi: natae'ig il'intichabaet tizaeA Aala ilhawa' mubaesharitn
